prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "9A. Controls and Procedures" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 10. Directors, Executive Officers and Corporate Governance".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 9A's text:
- If the "Item 10" heading is visible on this page, Item 9A ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 9A runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 9A at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Changes in Internal Control over Financial Reporting

There were no changes in our internal control over financial reporting (as such term is defined in Rules 13a-15(f) and 15d-15(f) of the Exchange Act)
during the most recent fiscal quarter that have materially affected, or are reasonably likely to materially affect, our internal control over financial
reporting.

Item 9B. Other Information

None.

Item 9C. Disclosure Regarding Foreign Jurisdictions that Prevent Inspections

Not applicable.
